title: Directive (GSM v1)
description: Identity-level, long-term normative constraint. Grammar: Modal × Verb × PurposeQualifier × PurposeScope(Purpose). Subject is always the owning System. Unconditional by nature: applies universally within its owning System.

modal.description: Deontic obligation strength. Grounded in deontic logic: {Obligatory, Permitted, Forbidden}. Precedence: MUST > SHOULD > MAY.

verb.description: Constrained verb set for deterministic directive appraisal. Direction semantics: {MAXIMIZE, PROMOTE, ENSURE} = positive; {MINIMIZE, REDUCE, AVOID} = negative; {PRESERVE, BALANCE} = neutral.

purposeQualifier.description: Free-form quality attribute name within the governance sentence (e.g., 'integrity', 'throughput', 'latency'). NOT a reference to a SystemicPrimitiveDefinition.

purposeScope.description: Reference to the Purpose being governed (value target). Must belong to the same System as the owning Directive.
